title: Sky Whales
description: This mod adds a rare neutral flying whale. Kill it to harvest its corpse, which gives lift giving blocks for Create: Aeronautics.
body:
Sky Whales adds rare whales that drift high above the oceans. They keep to themselves, but get too close and they'll
  hit back with a sonic blast, so hunting one is a real fight.

  When a whale dies it leaves a floating skeleton you can harvest. The bones and meat are physics blocks that tie into
  the Create: Aeronautics and Sable airship mods, giving you a new way to gather lift for your own builds.
